# Aruba AOS MIBs (Mobility Controllers + APs)

Public source: https://github.com/aruba/aruba-mibs
(or https://asp.arubanetworks.com/downloads)

`scripts/download_mibs.sh` fetches these automatically. Key OIDs NetPulse polls
(ARUBA enterprise 14823): `wlsxSysXCpuUtilization`, `wlsxSysXMemoryUsage`,
`wlsxSysXMemorySize`, `wlsxTotalNumAPs`, `wlsxTotalNumClients`.

Place downloaded `.mib`/`.my` files in this directory.
